---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or behavior change
title: 'feat: '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- Describe the situation that prompted the request. What are you trying
     to do? What's the friction? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like the tool to do. Be as concrete as you can — a CLI flag,
     a new MCP tool, a different default, a new render mode, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Anything you tried that didn't work, or other approaches you weighed.
     This helps us understand the design space and avoid suggesting something
     you've already ruled out. -->

## Why this fits agent-tree

<!-- agent-tree is intentionally narrow: navigate Claude Code (and future
     Codex/Gemini) sessions as a tree, resume from any node. Features that 
     extend that core mission have a much higher bar than features that 
     drift toward "general session analytics" or "yet another visualizer".
     Help us see why this belongs. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, related issues, links to similar features in other tools, etc. -->
